rows.source_ref: Proximus, "Holy Grail System" thread, BabyPips forum, 2013, https://forums.babypips.com/t/holy-grail-system/57359
rows.concept: A closed-source custom MT4 arrow indicator flags reversals (green arrow below = buy, red above = sell); you are always in the market and stop-and-reverse on the opposite arrow with a ~10-15 pip SL.
rows.eligibility_reason: Signal engine is an undisclosed proprietary black box the author refuses/cannot decompose ('specially modified PSAR/ADX/ATR + special volume filter, only works together'); early fractal versions admittedly repaint (look-ahead, non-deterministic) and later v2.5 'divergence scalper' / v4 'PRECISION' internals are never stated - the actual entry rule can never be reconstructed from the text.
rows.notes: Only the trade-management shell is disclosed (opposite-arrow exit, SL ~10-15 pips, no TP, EUR/USD USD/CHF GBP/USD USD/JPY, M15+); that is not an edge without the signal logic. Community-added filter variants (50/55 EMA trend gate, braintrend trailing stop) all still hinge on the black-box arrow. Thread verdict across 147 posts: repaints, lags, 'useless system, all signals repaint'; OP abandoned it (last post ~2013). No martingale/grid, but not implementable as a deterministic rule set.
